keys.description: Per-tenant refund list results with a filter hash suffix. Read hot on admin dashboards. Invalidated on any refund state transition.
Single refund full row + parent payment/invoice/credit_note/transaction. Read by admin UI + customer detail view + refund progress polling.
Remaining refundable amount for a payment (payment.amount_cents - SUM(non-cancelled/rejected/failed refunds). Read hot on preview + create paths.
Pending-approvals queue for a tenant. Feeds the SDUI pending-approvals screen + the tenant.{id}.refunds.pending-approvals broadcast channel's initial payload.
Per-customer refund list. Read by /api/v1/refunds/mine + customer.{id}.refunds broadcast channel's initial payload.
Refund lines for a specific refund. Read by SDUI refund-line editor + refund detail view.
Current sequence number for RefundNumberGenerator per-tenant per-year. Auto-incremented on refund_number allocation. NEVER expires — persists across process restarts.
invalidatedBy: yearly boundary (natural rollover — new sequence per year)

keys.description: List of user_ids holding refunds.approve permission for a tenant. Read by NotifyRefundApprovalRequiredJob to seed approver notifications. Invalidated on permission changes.
Cached refund-volume report response. period_key = period_start-period_end in ISO 8601. Powers the /reports/refund-volume endpoint's non-hot path.
In-progress ReconcileRefundsJob run state per provider. Prevents concurrent runs. run_key = timestamp bucket.
